name: stage-zero classify reveals the whole rule surface — far more namespaces than the in-scope subset
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); fs=d["full_surface"]; inscope=d["workload_classification"]["namespaces"].length; exit(fs.length>=40 && fs.length>inscope ? 0:1)' && echo reveals-full-surface 1>&2
